expected.notes: Employment letter and paystub show matching employer names; rule requires mismatch status to fire, so this case must not trigger the warning.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'employment_letter_paystub_employer_mismatch', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - comparison.employment_letter_paystub_employer_name mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
